query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('moodLogs','moodSignals','timelineEvents','icalEvents','assignmentSubmissions','blockGrades','parentFlags','emotionalStruggles','listeningSummaries','books','ownedBooks','bookAssignments') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
